name: Mother’s Kisses

ingredients.item: hazelnuts, toasted and skin removed, as described on Torta alle Nocciole e Cioccolato Amaro, then roughly pounded

method: In a mixer beat the butter and sugar together until light in colour and fluffy. Add the flour, hazelnuts and salt, and mix for a short time until the dough is just amalgamated.

Put some greaseproof paper on an oven tray. Take a little of the dough and between your hands roll it into little oval balls, about 2 cm in diameter. Lay the balls out, side by side, on the tray, and bake in the oven until they are lightly golden, about 10–15 minutes.
Take the tray out of the oven, allow the biscuits to cool slightly before touching them (otherwise they will break apart) and then let them cool on a wire rack.
In a large bowl sift the icing sugar and then gently roll the little biscuits in it, until well coated.
